@@ -1,2010 +0,0 @@
-{
-  "$schema": "http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#",
-  "$id": "https://clawdis.dev/protocol.schema.json",
-  "title": "Clawdis Gateway Protocol",

-    {
-      "$ref": "#/definitions/RequestFrame"
